findings.name: research ↔ product-spec
details: Key inferred requirement (003 backfill notification) reflected in product-spec/user-journey.md Journey B.
Q-008 (per-recipient FIFO) correctly attributed to industry practice and matched in product-spec.

findings.name: product-spec ↔ spec.md
details: All 11 product-spec user stories (US-001..US-011) have coverage in spec.md via FR decomposition.
Must Have stories US-001..US-007 are explicitly addressed.
US-008..US-011 coverage via FR-010/FR-020/FR-021 (US-008), FR-017/FR-018 (US-011) and inline references to US-009/US-010 in risk/test sections.

findings.name: spec.md ↔ plan.md
details: Plan API surface (publish, subscribe, replay) maps to spec.md API surface and FR-001..FR-004, FR-010, FR-012.
Governance rules GR-002, GR-007, GR-008, GR-009, GR-011 explicitly addressed.
Architecture choice (hybrid push+replay) is a legitimate implementation specialization of spec.md Q-001 transport-open.

findings.name: plan.md ↔ tasks.md
details: Task graph T001-T066 mirrors plan phases (Foundation → Registry → Publish Ingest → Subscribe+Replay → Telemetry → Cross-feature → Verification).
Tasks cover all Must Have stories US-001..US-007 and all critical governance rules.
Dependency graph DAG is acyclic and matches declared task order.

findings.name: tasks.md ↔ code (missing-impl)
details: All 66 tasks are unchecked. Implementation paths referenced in tasks (packages/api/notifications-api/*, packages/shared/notifications/*) do not exist on disk.
Expected given pre-implement phase. No action required.

findings.name: cross-link integrity
details: All internal relative links (./spec.md, ./plan.md, ./tasks.md, ./review.md, ./product-spec/*.md, ./research/*.md, ./v-model/*.md) resolve to existing files.
External links to sibling feature specs (../002-user-auth/*.md, ../001-sous-chef-recipe-app/*.md, etc.) are cross-feature references and may reside on other branches; they are not internal 014 drift.
verify-report.md and review.md link targets are valid internal paths.

out_of_scope_flags.detail: Monorepo path conventions in tasks.md use packages/api/ and packages/shared/. No apps/X references in artifact chain.
